glosses.vi: đồ nội thất; món đồ nội thất

sentences.target: Ce meuble prend trop de place.

translations.fr: Ce meuble prend trop de place.
translations.en: This piece of furniture takes up too much space.
translations.de: Dieses Möbelstück nimmt zu viel Platz ein.
translations.ko: 이 가구가 너무 많은 공간을 차지해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件家具占用太多空间。
translations.yue: 呢件傢俬佔咗太多空間。
translations.ru: Эта мебель занимает слишком много места.
translations.he: הרהיט הזה תופס יותר מדי מקום.
translations.tr: Bu mobilya çok fazla yer kaplıyor.
translations.vi: Món đồ nội thất này chiếm quá nhiều chỗ.
translations.ar: هذه القطعة من الأثاث تشغل مساحة كبيرة جدًا.
translations.nl: Dit meubelstuk neemt te veel ruimte in.
translations.uk: Ці меблі займають занадто багато місця.
translations.hu: Ez a bútor túl sok helyet foglal.
translations.hi: यह फर्नीचर बहुत ज़्यादा जगह घेरता है.
translations.pl: Ten mebel zajmuje zbyt dużo miejsca.
translations.el: Αυτό το έπιπλο πιάνει πάρα πολύ χώρο.
translations.nb: Dette møbelet tar for mye plass.
translations.id: Furnitur ini memakan terlalu banyak ruang.
translations.sv: Den här möbeln tar upp för mycket plats.
translations.ro: Această piesă de mobilier ocupă prea mult spațiu.
translations.cs: Tento kus nábytku zabírá příliš mnoho místa.
translations.fi: Tämä huonekalu vie liian paljon tilaa.
translations.ja: この家具は場所を取りすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular; modifies 'meuble' to point to a specific item.
Common noun; masculine singular; subject of the verb 'prend'.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; expresses the action performed by the subject.
Degree adverb; quantifies the amount in the phrase 'de place'.
Preposition introducing a measure/partitive phrase; links 'place' to the verb construction.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de' in the quantified phrase 'trop de place'.

sentences.target: Je monte le meuble cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɔ̃t lə mœbl sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: Je monte le meuble cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɔ̃t lə mœbl sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: I'm assembling the furniture this afternoon.
translations.es: Voy a montar el mueble esta tarde.
translations.de: Ich montiere das Möbelstück heute Nachmittag.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天下午要组装这件家具。
translations.yue: 我今日下午會裝呢件傢俬。
translations.ru: Я буду собирать мебель сегодня днём.
translations.pt: Vou montar o móvel esta tarde.
translations.he: אני מרכיב את הרהיט היום אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Bu öğleden sonra mobilyayı monte edeceğim.
translations.vi: Chiều nay tôi sẽ lắp món đồ nội thất này.
translations.ar: سأركّب قطعة الأثاث هذه بعد ظهر היום.
translations.nl: Vanmiddag zet ik het meubel in elkaar.
translations.uk: Сьогодні після обіду я збиратиму ці меблі.
translations.el: Το απόγευμα θα συναρμολογήσω το έπιπλο.
translations.nb: I ettermiddag skal jeg montere møbelet.
translations.id: Sore ini saya akan merakit furnitur itu.
translations.sv: I eftermiddag ska jag montera möbeln.
translations.ja: 今日の午後に家具を組み立てます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 1st person singular; subject of 'monte'.
Main verb; 1st person singular present; takes 'le meuble' as its direct object.
Definite article; masculine singular; determiner of 'meuble', marking specificity.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'monte'.
Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular form used before vowel/h muet; modifies 'après-midi'.
Compound noun; functions as a temporal adverbial complement indicating when the action occurs.

translations.en: You can move this piece of furniture.
translations.he: אתה יכול להזיז את הרהיט הזה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể di chuyển món đồ nội thất này.
translations.hu: El tudod mozdítani ezt a bútort.
translations.hi: तुम इस फर्नीचर को हिला सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μετακινήσεις αυτό το έπιπλο.
translations.sv: Du kan flytta den här möbeln.
translations.ro: Poți muta această piesă de mobilier.
translations.ja: この家具を移動できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun; 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary; 2nd person singular present; expresses ability and selects the infinitive 'déplacer'.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal; denotes the action to be performed.
Demonstrative determiner; masculine singular; modifies 'meuble', marking specificity.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object of 'déplacer'.

sentences.target: Ce magasin vend un meuble solide.

translations.fr: Ce magasin vend un meuble solide.
translations.en: This store sells a sturdy piece of furniture.
translations.es: Esta tienda vende un mueble resistente.
translations.de: Dieser Laden verkauft ein robustes Möbelstück.
translations.it: Questo negozio vende un mobile robusto.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家商店出售一件结实的家具。
translations.yue: 呢間舖頭賣一件結實嘅傢俬。
translations.pt: Esta loja vende um móvel resistente.
translations.tr: Bu mağaza sağlam bir mobilya satıyor.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng này bán một món đồ nội thất chắc chắn.
translations.ar: هذا المتجر يبيع قطعة أثاث متينة.
translations.nl: Deze winkel verkoopt een stevig meubelstuk.
translations.hu: Ez a bolt masszív bútort árul.
translations.hi: यह दुकान मज़बूत फर्नीचर बेचती है.
translations.el: Αυτό το κατάστημα πουλάει ένα ανθεκτικό έπιπλο.
translations.nb: Denne butikken selger et solid møbel.
translations.id: Toko ini menjual perabot yang kokoh.
translations.sv: Den här butiken säljer en stadig möbel.
translations.ro: Acest magazin vinde o piesă de mobilier solidă.
translations.cs: Tento obchod prodává bytelný kus nábytku.
translations.da: Denne butik sælger et solidt møbel.
translations.ja: この店は頑丈な家具を売っています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'magasin' to indicate a specific store.
Common noun; masculine singular; subject of 'vend'.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; takes 'un meuble solide' as its object.
Indefinite article; masculine singular; introduces a new, non-specific referent.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adjective; postnominal modifier of 'meuble'; denotes the item's sturdiness/quality.
